caption: Against a background of a red brick wall, three people are gathered around a white table. A young girl with braided hair, wearing a pink long-sleeved shirt, sits next to a woman wearing a green tank top and a white crocheted cap. A third person, partially visible on the left, wears a blue garment over a striped shirt. They are looking at a large open book with blue illustrations. The girl holds the edge of a page, preparing to turn it. The woman has her hand near her chin, observing the book. Throughout the sequence, the girl begins to lift and flip the page toward the left. On the right side of the table, a person's hand is visible, resting near the edge of the book. The scene remains static in terms of camera position and lighting as the characters interact with the book.
